package.name: m_ahe_ecosystem_manager
package.description: Ecosystem manager node for AHE-MRTA. Computes the context vector, maintains dominance vector, cooperation matrix, and suppression matrix for all 7 strategy agents. Generates allocation weights via softmax(M * D(t)). Logs EcosystemState for offline analysis only -- never sends ecosystem internal state to robot agents. Strategy agents: Spatial Opportunist, Criticality Guardian, Temporal Regulator, Resource Distributor, Energy Conservator, Stability Controller, Recovery Coordinator.
